appName.description: Extension name shown in the browser.

appDescription.message: FitShield browser extension that helps you stay mindful of food delivery and fast-food ordering.
appDescription.description: Extension description shown in the browser.

timerDurationHint.message: Adjust the countdown before Continue appears.

siteOpenTimeHint.message: Choose how long sites stay open after the timer ends.

scheduleDefaultSummary.message: Blocking will follow your daily schedule when this is enabled.

currentScheduleSummary.description: $1 is a time range, optionally followed by ' every day'.

popupBlockerSubtitle.message: Turn every block list on or off.

popupMetadataSubtitle.message: Block whole groups of sites by country or food category.

popupCustomSubtitle.message: Add your own sites and disable them individually.

popupScheduleSubtitle.message: Useful for meal budgets, late-night ordering, or work hours.

statusAllDisabled.message: Blocker is on, but every individual site is disabled. Open Settings to turn some sites back on.

statusBypassActive.message: Temporary pass is active. Blocking resumes in $1.
statusBypassActive.description: $1 is a remaining-time string such as '4m 12s'.

statusOutsideSchedule.message: Blocker is armed, but outside scheduled hours. It will block from $1.

searchMatchSuffix.description: $1 is the count of matching sites; appended to a count line.

warningIntro.message: Check in before you order. Hunger, convenience, stress, and habit can feel similar in the moment.

warningHintLocked.message: When the timer ends, you can continue to the site for $1 $2.

warningUnlockHint.message: You can visit the site now. The blocker will come back automatically after $1 $2.

warningErrorHint.message: Something went wrong while opening the site. Please try again.

blockReasonMoreCountries.description: $1 is the number of additional countries not shown.

recipeTimeLabel.description: $1 is the estimated time in minutes.

recipeCaloriesLabel.description: $1 is the estimated calories for the recipe.

recipeChoiceNote.message: Nice choice — logged in your stats. See it in Settings.

scheduledHoursHint.message: Block only during a daily time window.

customizeBlocklistIntro.message: Choose which built-in groups are active, turn individual sites on or off, and add your own domains.

customUrlsSettingsSubtitle.message: Add your own domains and disable them individually.

customNormalizeHint.message: Entries are normalized to domains and blocked across all pages.

customEmptyDefault.message: No custom blocked sites yet. Add a domain like example.com above to start blocking it.

customNoMatch.message: No custom URLs match this search.

emptyDeliverySearch.message: No delivery sites match this search.

emptyFastFoodSearch.message: No fast food sites match this search.

noticeMatched.description: $1 count, $2 site/sites unit, $3 the search term.

invalidUrlNotice.message: That URL does not look valid yet. Try a domain like example.com.

alreadyOnBlocklist.message: $1 is already on the blocklist, so it has been re-enabled.

addedToBlocklist.message: $1 was added to the custom blocklist.

removedFromBlocklist.message: $1 was removed from the custom blocklist.

metadataIntro.message: Block whole groups of sites by the country a brand operates in or the kind of food it serves. These blocks add to your existing site and custom-URL blocks.

blockByCountryHint.message: Search by country name or code, e.g. "United" or "US". Enabling a country blocks every brand active there.

countryQuickEmpty.message: Enable a country from search to pin it here.

blockByCategoryHint.message: Search categories like burger, pizza, or coffee. Specialties are searchable too; the block applies by category.

categoryQuickEmpty.message: Enable a category from search to pin it here.

languageIntro.message: Choose the language FitShield uses for its own screens. This overrides your browser language for the extension only.

languageHint.message: Search for a language and select it. Choose System default to follow your browser.

mbChipRemoveAria.description: $1 is a country or category label.

systemThemeHint.message: Device preference or a fixed mode.

backupIntro.message: Save your FitShield settings to a file, or restore them on another device. Everything stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

importSuccessNotice.description: $1 is the number of settings restored.

importErrorNotice.message: That file isn't a valid FitShield backup.

reorderCardLabel.message: Reorder card: $1. Use arrow keys to move it.
reorderCardLabel.description: $1 is the card's title. Accessible label for the drag handle.

protectionStatusIntro.message: A private, on-device estimate of what FitShield has helped you skip. These are estimates, and nothing here is uploaded.

avgMealCostHint.message: Used to estimate money saved when you skip an order. Stored on your device only.

avgMealCaloriesHint.message: Used to estimate calories avoided when you pick a recipe instead. Stored on your device only.

resetIntro.message: Restore parts of FitShield to their defaults. Each action asks for confirmation first.

resetBlockingHint.message: Timers, schedule, site toggles, custom URLs, and country/category blocks.

resetPreferencesHint.message: Average meal cost, calorie settings, and your saved stats.

factoryResetHint.message: Erase everything and return FitShield to a fresh install.

confirmResetBlocking.message: Reset all blocking settings to their defaults? Your theme, language, and saved stats are kept.

confirmResetAppearance.message: Reset the theme and appearance to the default dark mode?

confirmResetPreferences.message: Reset your meal-cost and calorie preferences, plus the saved-money and calories-avoided stats?

confirmFactoryReset.message: Factory reset FitShield? This erases all settings, custom sites, and stats on this device. This cannot be undone.

welcomeSubtitle.message: A few quick choices and you're set. Everything stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

welcomeLangBody.message: This sets the language for FitShield's popup, settings, and block screen.

welcomeThemeBody.message: You can fine-tune colors later in Settings.

welcomeFastFoodBody.message: Adds a pause screen on major fast-food chains' ordering pages.

welcomeDeliveryBody.message: Adds a pause screen on delivery platforms like DoorDash and Uber Eats.

welcomeImportBody.message: Coming from another device? Import a FitShield settings file to bring everything over. Otherwise just continue.

welcomeHelpBody.message: A quick tour of the main features.

welcomeFeaturePauseBody.message: When you hit a blocked site, a short countdown runs before you can continue — enough to rethink the order.

welcomeFeatureScheduleBody.message: Optionally block only during set hours, like evenings or work time.

welcomeFeatureWhitelistBody.message: Turn off any individual site, add your own custom URLs, or grant a temporary pass when you really need it.

welcomeFeatureRecipeBody.message: The block screen suggests a quick vegetarian and a meat/protein recipe based on what you blocked.

welcomeStepLabel.description: $1 is the current step number, $2 is the total.

whatsNewSubtitle.message: A quick look at what changed.

supportFooterText.message: If FitShield helped you avoid an unnecessary delivery order, optional support helps keep blocklists and docs moving.
